must_detect.matched_text: Re: Project KUDA — Proposed acquisition of 35% of PT KudaPay Sentosa (fintech) by PT Dompet Nusantara Teknologi Tbk (Perseroan).

Re: Project KUDA — Proposed acquisition of 35% of PT KudaPay Sentosa (fintech) by PT Dompet Nusantara Teknologi Tbk (Perseroan).
Non-public; embargo until 12 June 2026 09:00 WIB; IDX announcement draft withheld pending OJK informal consult.
Term Sheet executed 27 May 2026; target signing of Share Purchase Agreement (S P A) by 10 June 2026 subject to standard conditions precedent.
Purchase price approx. IDR 142,500,000,000; earn-out up to IDR 25,000,000,000 contingent on 2027 TPV; funding from internal cash (no rights issue).
MAC/MAE: draft provides customary MAC; for clarity, no MAC has occurred to date and “pandemic/BI rate moves” are carved out.
Disclosure: material information under POJK 31/POJK.04/2015; we plan OJK submission and IDX IDXNet filing immediately post-embargo unless signing slips.
Employment/retention: offer letters to Bpk. Dr. Rendra Arif (CEO, KudaPay) and Ibu Mira Tanjung (CTO) incl. 12‑mo. non-compete and RSU grants equal to 0.6% of fully diluted shares; draft emails prepared: ren.arif@kudapay.id, mira.t@kudapay.id.
Fintech compliance: target’s P2P lending operations and e-money float controls reviewed; OJK registry shows status “aktif” (public), but internal audit notes gaps in vendor KYC; remedial plan attached.
As publicly reported by Nusa Market Wire on 1 Apr 2026, sector NPL ratios improved; this line is public and not price-sensitive.
investor-relations draft ready; quiet period applies; do not circulate outside BoD; see https://intra.dompetnusantara.co.id/board/Proj-KUDA?v=5&tok=ab1-2xZ&utm=ir_draft.
